plugin.name: Aardwolf_Market_Helper_V4
plugin.author: Dunnaakr
plugin.purpose: Captures Aardwolf marketplace output into the main window with clickable actions.
plugin.description:
Aardwolf marketplace helper (main output edition).
Commands intercepted: lbid lbid <num> lbid mybids market list market bid <num>
Features: - Replays lbid output into the main window with clickable actions - Preserves the original lbid color styling - Click item number for details in a miniwindow - Click last bid to bid the next tier - Click cov to send: dinv covet warrior <num> - Click prx to enter a proxy total, then send: market bid <num> <amount> proxy confirm
Notes: - QP bids increase by 10 per bid - Gold bids use previous bid + max(500, min(5%, 50000)) - A trailing * on Last Bid means you are currently winning that item - Do not run this plugin at the same time as the miniwindow market plugin, because both intercept the same commands.

muclient.script:
require "wrapped_captures" require "themed_miniwindows" require "aardwolf_colors"
market_plugin = { last_list_command = "lbid", current_detail_num = nil, rows_by_num = {}, pending_after_list = nil, detail_window = nil, list_start_pattern = "^\\s*\\[ Aardwolf Marketplace - Current List of Inventory \\]\\s*$", list_end_pattern = "^Type: 'Lbid <num>' to see stats and 'Lbid <num> <amount>' to bid on an item\\.$", detail_start_pattern = "^\\+[-]+\\+$", detail_end_pattern = "^\\| Current bid\\s+:\\s+.*\\|$", min_increment = 500, max_increment = 50000, percent_increment = 0.05, qp_increment = 10, }
local function trim(value) return (value or ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") end
local function line_text(styles) return trim(strip_colours_from_styles(styles or {})) end
local function clean_amount(amount_text) local cleaned = ((amount_text or ""):gsub("[,%*%s]", "")) return tonumber(cleaned) end
local function format_amount(amount) local reversed = tostring(math.floor(amount or 0)):reverse():gsub("(%d%d%d)", "%1,"):reverse() return reversed:gsub("^,", "") end
local function is_qp_listing(listing_type) return (listing_type or ""):upper():find("QP", 1, true) ~= nil end
local function requires_confirm(listing_type) local typed = (listing_type or ""):upper() return typed:find("QP", 1, true) ~= nil or typed:find("TP", 1, true) ~= nil end
function market_next_bid_amount(last_bid_text, listing_type) local current = clean_amount(last_bid_text) or 0 if current < 1 then current = 1 end
if is_qp_listing(listing_type) then return current + market_plugin.qp_increment end
local increment = math.ceil(current * market_plugin.percent_increment) increment = math.min(increment, market_plugin.max_increment) increment = math.max(increment, market_plugin.min_increment) return current + increment end
local function parse_market_row(raw_line, styles) local num, description, level, listing_type, last_bid, bids, time_left = raw_line:match("^%s*(%d+)%s+(.-)%s+(%d+)%s+([*%a]+)%s+([%d,]+%*?)%s+(%d+)%s+(.+)$")
if not num then return nil end
return { num = num, description = description, level = level, listing_type = listing_type, last_bid = last_bid, bids = bids, time_left = time_left, raw_line = raw_line, styles = styles, } end
local function emit_styles_inline(styles) for _, segment in ipairs(styles or {}) do ColourTell(RGBColourToName(segment.textcolour), "", segment.text) end end
local function emit_styles_line(styles) emit_styles_inline(styles) Note("") end
local function emit_styles_slice(styles, startcol, endcol) if not styles then return end if endcol < startcol then return end local chunk = TruncateStyles(styles, startcol, endcol) if chunk and chunk[1] then emit_styles_inline(chunk) end end
local function style_color_name(styles, startcol, endcol, fallback) local chunk = TruncateStyles(styles, startcol, endcol) if chunk and chunk[1] then return RGBColourToName(chunk[1].textcolour) end return fallback or "white" end
local function emit_action_link(command, label, tooltip, color) Hyperlink(command, label, tooltip, color or "lightblue", "", 0, 1) end
local function render_market_row(row) local raw = row.raw_line or "" local styles = row.styles if not styles then ColourNote("white", "", raw) return end
local num_start, num_end = raw:find(row.num, 1, true) local prefix, last_bid = raw:match("^(.-)([%d,]+%*?)%s+%d+%s+[%dd:%s]+$") if not num_start or not num_end or not prefix or not last_bid then emit_styles_line(styles) return end
local bid_start = #prefix + 1 local bid_stop = bid_start + #last_bid - 1
emit_styles_slice(styles, 1, num_start - 1) emit_action_link( "lbid " .. row.num, raw:sub(num_start, num_end), "Open market item " .. row.num, style_color_name(styles, num_start, num_end, "cyan") )
emit_styles_slice(styles, num_end + 1, bid_start - 1)
if row.last_bid:sub(-1) == "*" then emit_styles_slice(styles, bid_start, bid_stop) else emit_action_link( string.format( "lbid %s %s%s", row.num, tostring(market_next_bid_amount(row.last_bid, row.listing_type)), requires_confirm(row.listing_type) and " confirm" or "" ), raw:sub(bid_start, bid_stop), "Bid next tier on item " .. row.num, style_color_name(styles, bid_start, bid_stop, "yellow") ) end
emit_styles_slice(styles, bid_stop + 1, #raw) Tell(" ") emit_action_link( "dinv covet warrior " .. row.num, "cov", "Send dinv covet warrior " .. row.num, "palegreen" ) Tell(" ") emit_action_link( string.format("marketproxy %s %s %s", row.num, row.listing_type, row.last_bid), "prx", "Enter a proxy total for item " .. row.num, "plum" ) Note("") end
local function sorted_market_rows() local rows = {} for _, row in pairs(market_plugin.rows_by_num or {}) do table.insert(rows, row) end table.sort( rows, function(a, b) return tonumber(a.num) < tonumber(b.num) end ) return rows end
local function report_mybids() Note("") ColourNote("silver", "", "[ Aardwolf Marketplace - My Winning Bids ]") Note("")
local winning_rows = {} for _, row in ipairs(sorted_market_rows()) do if (row.last_bid or ""):sub(-1) == "*" then table.insert(winning_rows, row) end end
if #winning_rows == 0 then ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "You are not currently the highest bidder on any cached market items.") return end
for _, row in ipairs(winning_rows) do render_market_row(row) end end
local function ensure_detail_window(item_num) if market_plugin.detail_window and market_plugin.detail_window.id then market_plugin.detail_window:clear(false) market_plugin.detail_window:dress_window("Marketplace Item #" .. item_num) return market_plugin.detail_window end
local win = ThemedTextWindow( GetPluginID() .. "_market_detail", 160, 120, 760, 520, "Marketplace Item #" .. item_num, "center", true, true, true, true, true, false, false, nil, nil, GetAlphaOption("output_font_name"), GetOption("output_font_height"), 3000, 6, true )
market_plugin.detail_window = win return win end
function market_proxy_prompt(item_num, listing_type, last_bid_text) local minimum = market_next_bid_amount(last_bid_text, listing_type) local message = string.format( "Enter your total proxy bid for item %s.\nMinimum next bid tier: %s", tostring(item_num), format_amount(minimum) ) local entered = utils.inputbox(message, "Proxy Bid", tostring(minimum), "Courier", 9) if not entered or trim(entered) == "" then return end
local amount = clean_amount(entered) if not amount then ColourNote("white", "red", "Proxy amount must be a number.") return end
if amount < minimum then ColourNote("white", "red", "Proxy amount must be at least the next bid tier: " .. format_amount(minimum)) return end
local command = string.format("market bid %s %s proxy confirm", tostring(item_num), tostring(amount)) Execute(command) ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "Proxy bid command sent: " .. command) end
function process_market_list(window_styles, start_line, end_line) market_plugin.rows_by_num = {} local callback = market_plugin.pending_after_list
if callback then for _, styles in ipairs(window_styles or {}) do local raw = strip_colours_from_styles(styles or {}) local row = parse_market_row(raw, styles) if row then market_plugin.rows_by_num[row.num] = row end end market_plugin.pending_after_list = nil callback() return end
for _, styles in ipairs(window_styles or {}) do local raw = strip_colours_from_styles(styles or {}) local row = parse_market_row(raw, styles) if row then market_plugin.rows_by_num[row.num] = row render_market_row(row) else emit_styles_line(styles) end end end
function process_market_detail(window_styles, start_line, end_line) local item_num = market_plugin.current_detail_num or "?" local win = ensure_detail_window(item_num)
for _, styles in ipairs(window_styles or {}) do local plain = line_text(styles) if plain ~= "" then win:add_text(styles, false) end end
local row = market_plugin.rows_by_num[item_num] if row then win:add_text("@W", false) if row.last_bid:sub(-1) == "*" then win:add_text("@GYou are already the current high bidder on this item.", false) else win:add_text( string.format("@WNext bid tier from cached market list: @G%s", format_amount(market_next_bid_amount(row.last_bid, row.listing_type))), false ) end end
win:fit_contents(GetInfo(281) - 50, GetInfo(280) - 90) win:set_scroll(1) win:show() win:bring_to_front() end
function market_capture_list(command) market_plugin.last_list_command = command or "lbid" Capture.command( market_plugin.last_list_command, market_plugin.list_start_pattern, market_plugin.list_end_pattern, true, false, true, false, process_market_list ) end
function market_capture_detail(item_num) market_plugin.current_detail_num = tostring(item_num) Capture.command( "lbid " .. tostring(item_num), market_plugin.detail_start_pattern, market_plugin.detail_end_pattern, true, false, true, false, process_market_detail ) end
function market_capture_mybids() market_plugin.pending_after_list = report_mybids market_capture_list("lbid") end
function OnPluginDisable() if market_plugin.detail_window and market_plugin.detail_window.id then market_plugin.detail_window:delete() market_plugin.detail_window = nil end end
